project_type: React SPA with TypeScript (Vite bundler), AWS backend with WebSocket streaming
build_system: npm + vite, tsc for type checking
test_framework: No frontend tests configured (no test runner in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compiles without errors, then run vite build to verify production build succeeds
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - npm install should work. No .env file present so build may warn about missing env vars but should still succeed for type checking.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: React functional components with hooks; WebSocketService is a class with event emitter pattern (on/off/emit); routing via react-router-dom with location.state for passing data between pages; useAuth() context hook for user info; tsconfig is strict with noUnusedLocals and exactOptionalPropertyTypes enabled
directory_structure: frontend/src/components/ - React components; frontend/src/services/ - API, auth, websocket services; frontend/src/contexts/ - React contexts (AuthContext); frontend/src/config/ - API config
